titleStmt.title: SII 28.149: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 149. (A.R. No. 304 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Published in S.I.I. Vol. XII, No. 151. (The text, however, is given below with some improvisations).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī § sakalapuvaṉa] ccakkaravattikaḷ śrīavaṉiyāḷap piṟantāraāṉa kopperuñciṅka tevaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu coḻakoṉ Olai teṉṉavaṉ brahmamārāyarum
jayatuṅka pallavaraiyarum tillaiampala pallavaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvarakaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum
sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu koyilukku ciṟappāka cātti Aruḷa tevara
ṭiyāril piḷḷaiyār ciṟṟiṭai Arivai ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavaṉattukku tirunantavaṉataṟaiyāka perumpaṟṟappuliyūr piṭākai kaṭavācceriyil Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ civaṉ
pakkal kavuṇiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ viṉāyakaṉ peril vilaikoṇṭa Ūrppaṭi nilam Orumāvum tirunantavaṉañ ceyyavum tirunantavaṉañceyyum Āḷ Oṉṟukku tirunantavaṉapuṟamāka Ivūrpiṭākai caṇṭe
śvaranallūril kulottuṅka coḻappirammamārāyaṉ brāhmaṇi pakkal koṇṭa civakāmacuntariviḷākam Eṉṟu per Uṭaiya Ūrppaṭi nilam nālu māvum Ivūr piṭākai Iḷanāṅkūril teṉṉavaṉ brahmamāraāyar pakkal vilaikoṇṭa
cirā viḷākam Eṉṟu per Uṭaiya nilattu Ūrppaṭi nilam Orumāvum koṟṟukku Uṭalākavum tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periyaṉācciyārkkuc cātti Aruḷa Iṟaṅkal mīṭṭa piḷḷaiyār ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavaṉattukku Ivūr piṭākai naṭuvil karaiyil
tirukkaḷiṟṟupaṭittoṇṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa kuḻi nūṟum tirunantavaṉañ ceyavum tirunantavaṉañ ceyum Āḷ Oṉṟukku tirunantavaṉapuṟamāka Ivūr piṭākai Iḷanāṅkūril teṉṉavaṉ brahmamārāyar pakkal vilaikoṇṭa cirāviḷākam Eṉṟuper Uṭaiya nilattu
Ūrpaṭi nilam Eḻumāvum koṟṟukku Uṭalākavum Āka Āḷ Iraṇṭu Āḷ Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyāka vanta tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruppū maṇṭapattu mutalāka Aḷakkavum tirunantavaṉakkuṭikkum tirunantavaṉap puṟamāka koṟṟukkum vilaikoṇṭa nilaṅkaḷukku
vilaikoṇṭa cātaṉaṅkaḷum nilaṅkaḷi maṭaṅku vākaḻiya perumpaṟṟapuliyūr mulaparuṣaiyār Eḻutiṉa niyokamum tirukkai Oṭṭi paṇṭārattu Oṭukkavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyil kalveṭṭakkaṭavatāka paṇṇuvate Ivai coḻakoṉ Eḻutteṉṟu pukunta Evattiṭṭiṉpaṭi kal
veṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
